Test.description: When `true`, indicates that test mode is enabled. The information is to be validated, but no data will be added or updated. Default: **false**

ClientId.description: The ID of the client being updated

NameOnAccount.description: The name on the bank account being added

RoutingNumber.description: The routing number of the bank account being added

AccountType.description: The account type. Possible values: * Checking * Savings
